page_subtitle: Review patient recordings across your organization

table.reset_confirm_message: This will clear all annotations, notes, and transcript edits for this review. The recording will return to unreviewed status.
table.no_recordings_description: There are no recordings matching your filters.

workstation.notes_placeholder: Add general notes about this review...
workstation.transcript_placeholder: No transcript available for this recording.
workstation.transcript_generating: Transcript is being generated. This may take a minute.
workstation.no_annotations: No annotations yet. Select a range on the waveform or press M to mark a stuttering moment.
workstation.confirm_delete_annotation: Are you sure you want to delete this annotation?
workstation.marking_end: Press M or click to mark end of stuttering moment
workstation.shortcuts_hint: Space play/pause · ← → seek 5s · M mark start/end · P play selection · Drag on waveform to select · Esc cancel
workstation.workflow_hint: Play the recording, then mark stuttering moments by pressing M or dragging on the waveform. Classify each moment with a core behavior, secondary behaviors, and tension level.
workstation.no_end_time: , press M to set end time
workstation.severity_modal_description: How severe was the stuttering overall?

secondary.label: Secondary Behaviors
secondary.V_desc: Noisy breathing, whistling, sniffing, blowing, clicking sounds
secondary.FG_desc: Jaw jerking, tongue protruding, lip pressing, jaw muscles tense, eye movements
secondary.ME_desc: Arm/hand movement, hands about face, torso movement, leg movement

tension.label: Tension Level
tension.2_desc: Signs of tension are immediately distracting, produced with visible effort
tension.3_desc: Signs of tension are highly distracting, produced with significant effort

region.label: Region on video
region.drawing_hint: Draw on the paused video frame
region.idle_hint: Pick a tool to mark a spot on the video
region.has_region: Has a region on the video
region.no_face: No face detected in the current frame

summary_panel.disfluencies_tooltip: Total disfluency annotations marked in this recording.
summary_panel.syllables_tooltip: Syllables counted from the transcript. Drives % stuttered syllables and speech rate.
summary_panel.stuttering_rate_tooltip: Disfluencies divided by syllables, as a percentage. The headline severity metric for stuttering.
summary_panel.speech_rate_tooltip: Syllables per minute across the full recording. Includes pauses (overall speech rate, not articulation rate).
summary_panel.avg_disfluency_duration_tooltip: Mean duration of disfluencies marked with both start and end timestamps. n is the number of disfluencies that contributed.
summary_panel.no_transcript_hint: Add a transcript to calculate syllable count, stuttering rate, and speech rate.
